products.name: STRING Rope Outdoor Dining Chair
products.description: An outdoor dining armchair from the STRING Collection with an anthracite aluminum frame, acrylic-rope sides and a seat cushion offered in granite or greige. The 60 × 58 × 77 cm format supports restaurant, café and hotel terrace planning.
materials: Anthracite aluminum
Acrylic rope
Granite or greige seat cushion
products.origin: China

products.name: STRING Aluminum Outdoor Lounger
products.description: A low-profile outdoor lounger from the STRING Collection, combining an anthracite aluminum frame with Batyline mesh. Its 200 cm depth makes it suitable for poolside, resort and hospitality planning where a full-length reclining format is required.
materials: Anthracite aluminum
Batyline mesh
products.origin: China

products.name: FOUNDATION Louvered Outdoor Cabana Daybed
products.description: A large-format outdoor cabana daybed from the FOUNDATION Collection. The anthracite aluminum frame, louvered roof and dark grey cushions create a defined relaxation zone for resort, hotel and poolside planning.
materials: Anthracite aluminum
Dark grey seat and back cushions
products.origin: China
